text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Biwa Hayahide have
come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These first three are crucial for an Umamusume.
As for how she's doing now that the Arima Kinen
is over...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's work on identifying my current problems,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Frankly, I need more experience. The senior
racers showed amazing resourcefulness during
races, and considering how intuition is derived
from experience...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Are you listening?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Just because our first three years are over doesn't
mean there won't be any more races!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't exactly call this my "winning equation"
until I can win every single race I enter, after all.
Don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She folds her arms calmly and stares at me. The
way she carries herself is formidable indeed.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?
choice_data_list:
Let's move forward and keep winning more
races!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh... That goes without saying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I are going over our plans for
future training when someone approaches us...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I just came to tell you one thing. Next time, I'll
beat you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And what if I don't let you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll do it anyway.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Mhm. I wouldn't expect anything less from you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sis.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: See you on the track.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm looking forward to racing you again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The exchange between the two sisters is
awkward... but their smiles sure do look alike.
